positive: A cute, kawaii-style flat lay illustration of breakfast items: a stack of fluffy pancakes drizzled with honey, topped with fresh berries, and accompanied by a smiling cup of coffee. The style is minimalist vector art, suitable for stickers and mugs. Use a soft, pastel palette (cream, light pink, sky blue, pale yellow). The overall composition must be clean, symmetrical, and cheerful. Clean lines, perfect vector illustration, kawaii aesthetic, flat design, simple background, delightful, high quality, 4k.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, realistic texture, complex shading, shadows, grunge
